---
title: "LRPBX03: Block-2 not-taught expressive vocabulary, block-active exposure (UE2)"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPBX03 is a **block-exposure** model for block-2 **not-taught** expressive vocabulary (`b2exnt`, out of 12): the expressive specificity / placebo comparator to the taught expressive model (LRPBX01), with the same staggered block-active exposure structure.

Because these words were **not** taught in block 2, a block-2 exposure effect on them should be ≈ 0. A positive exposure effect on the taught outcome (LRPBX01) together with a null effect here is the within-family intervention-fidelity check: the programme moves the words it teaches, not incidental vocabulary. Adjusters match the taught expressive model so the only difference is the outcome.

## Model

Beta-Binomial$(N, \mu\kappa, (1-\mu)\kappa)$ on the block-2 not-taught word count, $N = 12$, with
$\operatorname{logit}\mu_{i,t} = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{time}[t]} + \delta\,\text{exposed}_{i,t} + \gamma_A A_{\text{std},t} + \gamma_{\text{ability}}z(\text{blocks}) + \sum_{c}\gamma_c\,z(c) + u_{\text{child}}$, where $\text{exposed}_{i,t}=1$ once child $i$ has been taught block 2 by timepoint $t$ (immediate from t3, wait-list from t4), and the $z(c)$ are the standardised revised-DAG confounders hearing (HS = `hs`), speech production (SP = `deapp_c`) and phonological memory (RW = `erbto`), each with a missing-indicator (SP/RW read at the t1 baseline). No own-baseline term.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_results_block_exposure.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
